title: RiftLibrary
description: RiftLibrary is a fork of GeckoLib, which adds some new features in addition to GeckoLib's already-present features.
body:
RiftLib is a fork of [GeckoLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib) 1.12.2, which adds some new features in addition to GeckoLib's already-present features. These include the following:

* Dynamic Hitboxes
* Dynamic Rider positions
* Support for custom projectile models
* Animation blending
* A GUI API
* Packet API

Some more ideas down the line include:
* Custom particles made with snowstorm
* Support for hold on last frame
* Improvements to the mod's rendering in general
